    "Reversed polarity detected on the installed receptacles."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit, swap the hot and neutral conductors to their correct terminals (brass for hot, silver for neutral), and re-test for correct polarity."
  ],
  "rationale": "Reversed polarity violates NEC 200.11 and 406.4, presenting a severe shock hazard and potential equipment damage because the threaded shell of lamps or the wider slot of appliances remains energized even when switched off.",

    "NEC 200.11",
    "NEC 406.4"
  ]
